mapper.select: /* wif-das-robotdasintegration-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasIntegrationResultWaveSeq - RobotDAS 이형물/미출 Result Wave Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_rsltxnis_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-robotdasintegration-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasIntegrationResultOrderSeq - RobotDAS 이형물/미출 Result Order Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_rsltxnis_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-robotdasintegration-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasIntegrationResultItemSeq - RobotDAS 이형물/미출 Result Item Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_rsltxnis_ic') AS ITEM_SEQ
